S.FORM: == Haw-wan-ciw Ś•ĹśúõŤßí == Haw-wan-ciw " kamu nu Nan-huy: Kaap die Goeie Hoop,(ňĆk…Ďňźp di ňĆŌáuj…ô '…¶ ä…ôp), kamu nu He-lan Kaap de Goede Hoop,(ňĆkaňźb d…ô ňĆ…£ud…ô '…¶oňźp) , kamu nu Pu-taw-ya:Cabo da Boa Esperan√ßa,('kaő≤u √į…ź 'ő≤o…ź Ép…®'…ĺ…źŐÉs…ź)" itida i Hei-cuo nan-hei-kun-he-kuo a nutipan timilan, laad tu amis Kay-pu-tun sipwal km, mitepal tu Ta-si-yen, itida i Kay-pu-pan-daw a tatapangan, Nan-hei u tataydaan nu midangan a kitidaan. itida i Su-yen-se kakaydaan a sauwac caay henay kaydaan, Haw-wan-ciw u O-cuo sakatayda i walian a kakaydaan nu bayuan, katukuh ayda, nu micidekay nu tabakiay a balungaan anu caay picumud i Su-yun-se caculilan nu sauwac, amakayda aca i Haw-wan-ciw. ina Haw-wan-ciw hina kapatelacan nu tademaw u Huy-cuo talu sakatimul sa, milaad tu wali timul pasayda tu walian makaala tu caylimsep kunli, silaad tu Fuo-e-se-wan papangawan a E'-ciw-le-se-ciw kiya tatengaay nu Huy-cuo nu katimulan. yu cun-kuo cin-min-zitay nu malumanay u ngangan " Ta-lang-san". Ś•ĹśúõŤßí(ŚćóťĚěŤ™ě:Kaap die Goeie Hoop,(ňĆk…Ďňźp di ňĆŌáuj…ô '…¶ ä…ôp)ÔľõŤć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Kaap de Goede Hoop,(ňĆkaňźb d…ô ňĆ…£ud…ô '…¶oňźp) ÔľõŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Cabo da Boa Esperan√ßa,('kaő≤u √į…ź 'ő≤o…ź Ép…®'…ĺ…źŐÉs…ź)) 48km, "Ś§ßśĶ™ŚĪĪ". Lui't ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ caysipwalnem mihcaan, Pu-taw-ya mitahaway tu balungan ci Pa-e-tuo-luo-mei-u.Di-ya-se mitahaway nu tademaw namaka Li-se-pen malingatu, mikilim tu sakatayda i walian " hun-cin-le-tu" a buyuan muculil. ya balungan katukuhsa i Ta-si-yen atu In-tu-yen kalalitemuhan a nanuman, tabaki ku bali atu cakkep, tada tabakitu ku cacek mabelin ku balungan maenep. sadikuday idaw henay ku i baalungaay a maudipay nu tademawan mapacascas taydan i caayay kakatinengan nu ngangan, sisa idaw ku maudipay nu tademawan. sisa pangangan han ni Di-se-ya u " Paw-wan-ciw". saan ci Di-se-ya anu pacicien pacuna mungangew hakiya a makatukuh i In-tu, nika inai'tu ku kakanen, sisa mutikuaca taluma' i Pu-taw-ya. caysipsiwpic mihcaan sabaw cacy a demiad, duma a mitahaway a tademaw ci D.Cia-ma mililid tu balungan makayda i Haw-wan-ciw muculi micumud i In-tu-yen, yadah ku nipitupin tu'kim, dawa pataluma' i Pu-taw-ya. sumad han nu Pu-taw-ya wankuo ese kiya Paw-hung-ciw tu " Haw-wan-ciw" namakayda malaO-cuo tademaw sacudud tu In-tu-yeng nu dadanan. tu mihmihcaan tabakitu ku cakep atu bali nu Haw-wan-ciw, hina idaw ku " mipatayay nu cakepan" a tahekal, mahiniay a cakep saadidiay makaala tu lim‚ÄĒenem a kunce ku nikatalakawan, icelang makaala tu sabaw tu lima a kunce ku talakaw, tatapangan nu cakep mahida u dihep, kulul nu cakep mahida u masikitay nu buyu', makanay nu tademaw caay tu kasausi, u sakatalawan nu mitahaway a pabalungaay nu tademaw. caylimsepsep mihcaan, ci Di-se-ye mutikuaca pasayda i Haw-wan-ciw, kaletepan nu tabakiay a cakepan itida tu a mapatay. 1497ŚĻī11śúą, . caynemwalpic mihcaan sabaw tusa bulad tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay a demiad, idaw ku masakaputay ni Hu-ke-nuo-pay tademaw namaka He-lan katukuh i Haw-wan-ciw. sayaway nuheni ku sapiculimek tu Fa-kuo tinsukiw sapiedis saw tu sinzia sa taydan i He-lan ku nipilaliw, alaw katukuh i Haw-wan-ciw. 1687ŚĻī12śúą31śó•, . kalepacawan nu Na-puo-lun henay, He-lan-kun-he-kuo itida i caypicsiwlim mihcaan debungan nu Fa-kuo. sisa Kay-pu-ce-min-ti mala midapuay ku Fa-kuo, malaha hantayan nu fan-fa-tun-mun nu aedisan nu In-kuo. tawya a mihcaan In-kuo midebung tu Kay-pu kakitidaan. caywalseplu mihcaan, alesen nu In-kuo ku sapikuwan, nika i caywalsepnem mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw siwa dimian ci Pu-law-u-paw kalepacawan tu nikudan malingatu aca midebung tina kitidaan. He-lan-tademaw itida i caywalcaysip mihcaan a Lun-tun-kiyaku tu Kay-pu kitidaan sipikelap pabeli tu In-kuo a tademaw. caysiwcaysep mihcaan, Kay-pu kitidaan pulungen mala Na-huy-len-pan. . aydaay a Haw-wan-ciw bayu inai'tu ku tabakiay nu cakepan, nika idaw ku tabakiay nu calamay, mamiput satu likalikat nu ibayuay a tinhuy. aydatu a mihcaan, misangan aca ku Kay-pu-tun tu micapiay tu dadipasan nu tabakiay a baluhay nu papadikian, ipabaw idaw ku nisulitan tu ina kitidaan atu kitakid nu macimacian a lalaadan. 52 581 Kay-pu-pan-daw " igu: Cape Peninsula" , itida i Nan-huy masapucuay a pandaw. nikudan nina pandaw u tabakiay nu ba'tuan, nganngan han u takal a buyu' " Table Mt." talakaw milakuuyt tu cacay a malebut kuce. Pantaw a kalimucu u kasinganganan a Haw-wan-ciw, cacay a malebut enem a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcaan, He-lan tun In-tu kusi a balungn makaadih tina pantawan, itida i Cuo-wan " Table Bay" musaluiemeng itida mutapabaw, malingatu tu Nan-huy a mabulaway nu lui'tan. Kay-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku bangcalay tanayuay a dadipasan, sasasinganganay u Haw-te'-wan, Saw-ni-wan, idaw ku sabaw tusa a tungduh nu buyu' itida i liklik nu dadipasan, sisa pangangan han tu " sabaw tusa a disian a buyu'" i dadipasan nu bayu yadah ku nubayu a gaciw, idaw henay ku nikaadihan tu tusa a malebut enem a lasubuan nu canancanan nu kilangan. Kay-pu-pan-daw a duma nu picidekan a tuudan u tabakiay a ayaman, mikikaka tu kitakid nu pulung tu siwa a bataan a lasubu. Kay-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku nipatideng tu Kay-pu-tun tabakiay a cacudadan. . tataydaan nu aidanganśóÖťĀäśôĮťĽě tataydaan nu aidangan "igu:Tourist attraction", tuda sananay nu aidangan a aidangan, picidekan idaw ku sapatahekal tu hidasananay atu lalangawan nu puc, lui't a nikalalid, hidasananay atu nisangaan tu bangacalay, atu nipaini tu sakalimulan a aaidangan. . canacananÁ®ģť°ě kaakutian nu dadisapan atu lalangaw nu Pa-li-taw patayni tu katuuday a tademaw midang tina Tu-ciw-taw, mahida u dadipasananay a miyuan a nikacaay ka alasias nu demiadan. . pakunida hananay nu aadihan mahida u dadisapan, dihekuay a Tu-ciw-subal, kanatal aidangan, buyu', likelikenan atu kilakilangan u midangay a tademaw atu milisuay a laylay nu aaidangan. tataydaan tu lalangawan a aaidangan. idaw ku tataydaan midang idaw ku nipatucekan mutayda a midang taneng tu namaka kungkuay palatatataydaan midang tu sapalasasiwbayan. pasu mahida i Sin-muo-si-ke-cuo-luo-se-wi-e micapiay a UFO nikahetikan nu hikuki, itida i Su-ke-lan kaadihan tu sidi'tuay nu banaw a Ni-se-banaw. mitahaw tu mahicaay a di'tu palatataydaan nu kapahay a aaidangan. UFO . adidi' ku iluc nu masakaputay atu malaaaidangan, mahida nu Amilikaay a Tang-zin-cia atu In-kuo Lun-tun-pu-li-ke'-se-tun a lumeniay nu In-kuo a niyadu'an. . itini i Amilika, tataydaan midang idaw namin ku payapay mutidengtu i dadadanan atu pacakayay nu misiwbayay, tu tataydaan midang. duma idaw i kunliukiyuk a tataydaan, papatinakuan, kakanen atu kadideng nu liwkangngan atu tabakiay nu papatinakuan a nipabeli tu tataydaan midang nu aadihan tu cudadan. ilabu nu kanatal, mikacaw tu balunga atu basu kanamuhan nu taydaay a midang.
S.PHON: == ńßaw-wan- ¶iw *** == ńßaw-wan- ¶iw " kamu nu nan-ńßuj: kaap di…ô go…ôi…ô ńßoop,(*k**p di **uj…ô Ē~ °**…ôp), kamu nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan kaap d…ô go…ôd…ô ńßoop,(*ka*b d…ô **ud…ô Ē~ °*o*p) , kamu nu pu-taw-ja: ¶abo da boa …ôsp…ôran*a,( Ē~ °ka*u ** Ē~ °*o* *p* Ē~ °…ĺ**s*)" itida i ńß…ôi- ¶uo nan-ńß…ôi-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a nutipan timir~…ĺan, r~…ĺaad tu amis kaj-pu-tun sipwar~…ĺ km, mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu ta-si-j…ôn, itida i kaj-pu-pan-daw a tatapaŇčan, nan-ńß…ôi u tatajdaan nu midaŇčan a kitidaan. itida i su-j…ôn-s…ô kakajdaan a sauwa ¶ ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kajdaan, ńßaw-wan- ¶iw u o- ¶uo sakatajda i war~…ĺian a kakajdaan nu bajuan, katukuńß ajda, nu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan anu ¶aaj pi ¶umud i su-jun-s…ô ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu sauwa ¶, amakajda a ¶a i ńßaw-wan- ¶iw. ina ńßaw-wan- ¶iw a …ô Ē~ °- ¶iw-r~…ĺ…ô-s…ô- ¶iw kija tat…ôŇčaaj nu ńßuj- ¶uo nu katimur~…ĺan. ju ¶un-kuo ¶in-min-zitaj nu mar~…ĺumanaj u ŇčaŇčan " ta-r~…ĺaŇč-san". ***(***:kaap di…ô go…ôi…ô ńßoop,(*k**p di **uj…ô Ē~ mitańßawaj tu bar~…ĺuŇčan ¶i pa-…ô-tuo-r~…ĺuo-m…ôi-u.di-ja-s…ô mitańßawaj nu tad…ômaw namaka r~…ĺi-s…ô-p…ôn mar~…ĺiŇčatu, mikir~…ĺim tu sakatajda i war~…ĺian " ńßun- ¶in-r~…ĺ…ô-tu" a bujuan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ja bar~…ĺuŇčan katukuńßsa i ta-si-j…ôn atu in-tu-j…ôn kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a nanuman, tabaki ku bar~…ĺi atu ¶akk…ôp, tada tabakitu ku ¶a ¶…ôk mab…ôr~…ĺin ku bar~…ĺuŇčan ma…ôn…ôp. sadikudaj idaw ńß…ônaj ku i baar~…ĺuŇčaaj a maudipaj nu tad…ômawan mapa ¶as ¶as tajdan i ¶aajaj kakatin…ôŇčan nu ŇčaŇčan, sisa idaw ku maudipaj nu tad…ômawan. sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan ni di-s…ô-ja u " paw-wan- ¶iw". saan ¶i di-s…ô-ja anu pa ¶i ¶i…ôn pa ¶una muŇčaŇč…ôw ńßakija a makatukuńß i in-tu, nika inai Ē~ °tu ku kakan…ôn, sisa mutikua ¶a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i pu-taw-ja. ¶ajsipsiwpi ¶ mińß ¶aan sabaw ¶a ¶j a d…ômiad, duma a mitańßawaj a tad…ômaw ¶i d. ¶ia-ma mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu bar~…ĺuŇčan makajda i ńßaw-wan- ¶iw mu ¶ur~…ĺi mi ¶umud i in-tu-j…ôn, jadańß ku nipitupin tu Ē~ °kim, dawa patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i pu-taw-ja. sumad ńßan nu pu-taw-ja wankuo …ôs…ô kija paw-ńßuŇč- ¶iw tu " ńßaw-wan- ¶iw" namakajda mar~…ĺao- ¶uo tad…ômaw sa ¶udud tu in-tu-j…ôŇč nu dadanan. tu mińßmińß ¶aan tabakitu ku ¶ak…ôp atu bar~…ĺi nu ńßaw-wan- ¶iw, ńßina idaw ku " mipatajaj nu ¶ak…ôpan" a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, mańßiniaj a ¶ak…ôp saadidiaj makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺim*…ôn…ôm a kun ¶…ô ku nikatar~…ĺakawan, i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč makaar~…ĺa tu sabaw tu r~…ĺima a kun ¶…ô ku tar~…ĺakaw, tatapaŇčan nu ¶ak…ôp mańßida u dińß…ôp, kur~…ĺur~…ĺ nu ¶ak…ôp mańßida u masikitaj nu buju Ē~ °, makanaj nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj tu kasausi, u sakatar~…ĺawan nu mitańßawaj a pabar~…ĺuŇčaaj nu tad…ômaw. ¶ajr~…ĺims…ôps…ôp mińß ¶aan, ¶i di-s…ô-j…ô mutikua ¶a pasajda i ńßaw-wan- ¶iw, kar~…ĺ…ôt…ôpan nu tabakiaj a ¶ak…ôpan itida tu a mapataj. ********, . ¶ajn…ômwar~…ĺpi ¶ mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, idaw ku masakaputaj ni ńßu-k…ô-nuo-paj tad…ômaw namaka ńß…ô-r~…ĺan katukuńß i ńßaw-wan- ¶iw. sajawaj nuńß…ôni ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôk tu fa-kuo tinsukiw sapi…ôdis saw tu sinzia sa tajdan i ńß…ô-r~…ĺan ku nipir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, ar~…ĺaw katukuńß i ńßaw-wan- ¶iw. ***********, . kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu na-puo-r~…ĺun ńß…ônaj, ńß…ô-r~…ĺan-kun-ńß…ô-kuo itida i ¶ajpi ¶siwr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan d…ôbuŇčan nu fa-kuo. sisa kaj-pu- ¶…ô-min-ti mar~…ĺa midapuaj ku fa-kuo, mar~…ĺańßa ńßantajan nu fan-fa-tun-mun nu a…ôdisan nu in-kuo. tawja a mińß ¶aan in-kuo mid…ôbuŇč tu kaj-pu kakitidaan. ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôpr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn nu in-kuo ku sapikuwan, nika i ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôpn…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw siwa dimian ¶i pu-r~…ĺaw-u-paw kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tu nikudan mar~…ĺiŇčatu a ¶a mid…ôbuŇč tina kitidaan. ńß…ô-r~…ĺan-tad…ômaw itida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺun-tun-kijaku tu kaj-pu kitidaan sipik…ôr~…ĺap pab…ôr~…ĺi tu in-kuo a tad…ômaw. ¶ajsiw ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan, kaj-pu kitidaan pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn mar~…ĺa na-ńßuj-r~…ĺ…ôn-pan. . ajdaaj a ńßaw-wan- ¶iw baju inai Ē~ °tu ku tabakiaj nu ¶ak…ôpan, nika idaw ku tabakiaj nu ¶ar~…ĺamaj, mamiput satu r~…ĺikar~…ĺikat nu ibajuaj a tinńßuj. ajdatu a mińß ¶aan, misaŇčan a ¶a ku kaj-pu-tun tu mi ¶apiaj tu dadipasan nu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuńßaj nu papadikian, ipabaw idaw ku nisur~…ĺitan tu ina kitidaan atu kitakid nu ma ¶ima ¶ian a r~…ĺar~…ĺaadan. ** *** kaj-pu-pan-daw " igu: ¶ap…ô p…ôninsur~…ĺa" , itida i nan-ńßuj masapu ¶uaj a pandaw. nikudan nina pandaw u tabakiaj nu ba Ē~ °tuan, ŇčanŇčan ńßan u takar~…ĺ a buju Ē~ ° " tabr~…ĺ…ô mt." tar~…ĺakaw mir~…ĺakuujt tu ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku ¶…ô. pantaw a kar~…ĺimu ¶u u kasiŇčaŇčanan a ńßaw-wan- ¶iw, ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶aan, ńß…ô-r~…ĺan tun in-tu kusi a bar~…ĺuŇčn makaadińß tina pantawan, itida i ¶uo-wan " tabr~…ĺ…ô baj" musar~…ĺui…ôm…ôŇč itida mutapabaw, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu nan-ńßuj a mabur~…ĺawaj nu r~…ĺui Ē~ °tan. kaj-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj tanajuaj a dadipasan, sasasiŇčaŇčanaj u ńßaw-t…ô Ē~ °-wan, saw-ni-wan, idaw ku sabaw tusa a tuŇčduńß nu buju Ē~ ° itida i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu dadipasan, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " sabaw tusa a disian a buju Ē~ °" i dadipasan nu baju jadańß ku nubaju a ga ¶iw, idaw ńß…ônaj ku nikaadińßan tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubuan nu ¶anan ¶anan nu kir~…ĺaŇčan. kaj-pu-pan-daw a duma nu pi ¶id…ôkan a tuudan u tabakiaj a ajaman, mikikaka tu kitakid nu pur~…ĺuŇč tu siwa a bataan a r~…ĺasubu. kaj-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku nipatid…ôŇč tu kaj-pu-tun tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. . tatajdaan nu aidaŇčan**** tatajdaan nu aidaŇčan "igu:tourist attra ¶tion", tuda sananaj nu aidaŇčan a aidaŇčan, pi ¶id…ôkan idaw ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßidasananaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu pu ¶, r~…ĺui Ē~ °t a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺid, ńßidasananaj atu nisaŇčaan tu baŇča ¶ar~…ĺaj, atu nipaini tu sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺan a aaidaŇčan. . ¶ana ¶anan** kaakutian nu dadisapan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw nu pa-r~…ĺi-taw patajni tu katuudaj a tad…ômaw midaŇč tina tu- ¶iw-taw, mańßida u dadipasananaj a mijuan a nika ¶aaj ka ar~…ĺasias nu d…ômiadan. . pakunida ńßananaj nu aadińßan mańßida u dadisapan, dińß…ôkuaj a tu- ¶iw-subar~…ĺ, kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, buju Ē~ °, r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan u midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw atu mir~…ĺisuaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu aaidaŇčan. tatajdaan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aaidaŇčan. idaw ku tatajdaan midaŇč idaw ku nipatu ¶…ôkan mutajda a midaŇč tan…ôŇč tu namaka kuŇčkuaj par~…ĺatatatajdaan midaŇč tu sapar~…ĺasasiwbajan. pasu mańßida i sin-muo-si-k…ô- ¶uo-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-wi-…ô mi ¶apiaj a ufo nikańß…ôtikan nu ńßikuki, itida i su-k…ô-r~…ĺan kaadińßan tu sidi Ē~ °tuaj nu banaw a ni-s…ô-banaw. mitańßaw tu mańßi ¶aaj a di Ē~ °tu par~…ĺatatajdaan nu kapańßaj a aaidaŇčan. ufo . adidi Ē~ ° ku ir~…ĺu ¶ nu masakaputaj atu mar~…ĺaaaidaŇčan, mańßida nu amir~…ĺikaaj a taŇč-zin- ¶ia atu in-kuo r~…ĺun-tun-pu-r~…ĺi-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ô-tun a r~…ĺum…ôniaj nu in-kuo a nijadu Ē~ °an. . itini i amir~…ĺika, tatajdaan midaŇč idaw namin ku pajapaj mutid…ôŇčtu i dadadanan atu pa ¶akajaj nu misiwbajaj, tu tatajdaan midaŇč. duma idaw i kunr~…ĺiukijuk a tatajdaan, papatinakuan, kakan…ôn atu kadid…ôŇč nu r~…ĺiwkaŇčŇčan atu tabakiaj nu papatinakuan a nipab…ôr~…ĺi tu tatajdaan midaŇč nu aadińßan tu ¶udadan. ir~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ, mika ¶aw tu bar~…ĺuŇča atu basu kanamuńßan nu tajdaaj a midaŇč.
S.FORM: == Haw-wan-ciw Ś•ĹśúõŤßí == Haw-wan-ciw " kamu nu Nan-huy: Kaap die Goeie Hoop,(ňĆk…Ďňźp di ňĆŌáuj…ô '…¶ ä…ôp), kamu nu He-lan Kaap de Goede Hoop,(ňĆkaňźb d…ô ňĆ…£ud…ô '…¶oňźp) , kamu nu Pu-taw-ya:Cabo da Boa Esperan√ßa,('kaő≤u √į…ź 'ő≤o…ź Ép…®'…ĺ…źŐÉs…ź)" itida i Hei-cuo nan-hei-kun-he-kuo a nutipan timilan, laad tu amis Kay-pu-tun sipwal km, mitepal tu Ta-si-yen, itida i Kay-pu-pan-daw a tatapangan, Nan-hei u tataydaan nu midangan a kitidaan. itida i Su-yen-se kakaydaan a sauwac caay henay kaydaan, Haw-wan-ciw u O-cuo sakatayda i walian a kakaydaan nu bayuan, katukuh ayda, nu micidekay nu tabakiay a balungaan anu caay picumud i Su-yun-se caculilan nu sauwac, amakayda aca i Haw-wan-ciw. ina Haw-wan-ciw hina kapatelacan nu tademaw u Huy-cuo talu sakatimul sa, milaad tu wali timul pasayda tu walian makaala tu caylimsep kunli, silaad tu Fuo-e-se-wan papangawan a E'-ciw-le-se-ciw kiya tatengaay nu Huy-cuo nu katimulan. yu cun-kuo cin-min-zitay nu malumanay u ngangan " Ta-lang-san". Ś•ĹśúõŤßí(ŚćóťĚěŤ™ě:Kaap die Goeie Hoop,(ňĆk…Ďňźp di ňĆŌáuj…ô '…¶ ä…ôp)ÔľõŤć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Kaap de Goede Hoop,(ňĆkaňźb d…ô ňĆ…£ud…ô '…¶oňźp) ÔľõŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Cabo da Boa Esperan√ßa,('kaő≤u √į…ź 'ő≤o…ź Ép…®'…ĺ…źŐÉs…ź)) 48km, "Ś§ßśĶ™ŚĪĪ". Lui't ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ caysipwalnem mihcaan, Pu-taw-ya mitahaway tu balungan ci Pa-e-tuo-luo-mei-u.Di-ya-se mitahaway nu tademaw namaka Li-se-pen malingatu, mikilim tu sakatayda i walian " hun-cin-le-tu" a buyuan muculil. ya balungan katukuhsa i Ta-si-yen atu In-tu-yen kalalitemuhan a nanuman, tabaki ku bali atu cakkep, tada tabakitu ku cacek mabelin ku balungan maenep. sadikuday idaw henay ku i baalungaay a maudipay nu tademawan mapacascas taydan i caayay kakatinengan nu ngangan, sisa idaw ku maudipay nu tademawan. sisa pangangan han ni Di-se-ya u " Paw-wan-ciw". saan ci Di-se-ya anu pacicien pacuna mungangew hakiya a makatukuh i In-tu, nika inai'tu ku kakanen, sisa mutikuaca taluma' i Pu-taw-ya. caysipsiwpic mihcaan sabaw cacy a demiad, duma a mitahaway a tademaw ci D.Cia-ma mililid tu balungan makayda i Haw-wan-ciw muculi micumud i In-tu-yen, yadah ku nipitupin tu'kim, dawa pataluma' i Pu-taw-ya. sumad han nu Pu-taw-ya wankuo ese kiya Paw-hung-ciw tu " Haw-wan-ciw" namakayda malaO-cuo tademaw sacudud tu In-tu-yeng nu dadanan. tu mihmihcaan tabakitu ku cakep atu bali nu Haw-wan-ciw, hina idaw ku " mipatayay nu cakepan" a tahekal, mahiniay a cakep saadidiay makaala tu lim‚ÄĒenem a kunce ku nikatalakawan, icelang makaala tu sabaw tu lima a kunce ku talakaw, tatapangan nu cakep mahida u dihep, kulul nu cakep mahida u masikitay nu buyu', makanay nu tademaw caay tu kasausi, u sakatalawan nu mitahaway a pabalungaay nu tademaw. caylimsepsep mihcaan, ci Di-se-ye mutikuaca pasayda i Haw-wan-ciw, kaletepan nu tabakiay a cakepan itida tu a mapatay. 1497ŚĻī11śúą, . caynemwalpic mihcaan sabaw tusa bulad tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay a demiad, idaw ku masakaputay ni Hu-ke-nuo-pay tademaw namaka He-lan katukuh i Haw-wan-ciw. sayaway nuheni ku sapiculimek tu Fa-kuo tinsukiw sapiedis saw tu sinzia sa taydan i He-lan ku nipilaliw, alaw katukuh i Haw-wan-ciw. 1687ŚĻī12śúą31śó•, . kalepacawan nu Na-puo-lun henay, He-lan-kun-he-kuo itida i caypicsiwlim mihcaan debungan nu Fa-kuo. sisa Kay-pu-ce-min-ti mala midapuay ku Fa-kuo, malaha hantayan nu fan-fa-tun-mun nu aedisan nu In-kuo. tawya a mihcaan In-kuo midebung tu Kay-pu kakitidaan. caywalseplu mihcaan, alesen nu In-kuo ku sapikuwan, nika i caywalsepnem mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw siwa dimian ci Pu-law-u-paw kalepacawan tu nikudan malingatu aca midebung tina kitidaan. He-lan-tademaw itida i caywalcaysip mihcaan a Lun-tun-kiyaku tu Kay-pu kitidaan sipikelap pabeli tu In-kuo a tademaw. caysiwcaysep mihcaan, Kay-pu kitidaan pulungen mala Na-huy-len-pan. . aydaay a Haw-wan-ciw bayu inai'tu ku tabakiay nu cakepan, nika idaw ku tabakiay nu calamay, mamiput satu likalikat nu ibayuay a tinhuy. aydatu a mihcaan, misangan aca ku Kay-pu-tun tu micapiay tu dadipasan nu tabakiay a baluhay nu papadikian, ipabaw idaw ku nisulitan tu ina kitidaan atu kitakid nu macimacian a lalaadan. 52 581 Kay-pu-pan-daw " igu: Cape Peninsula" , itida i Nan-huy masapucuay a pandaw. nikudan nina pandaw u tabakiay nu ba'tuan, nganngan han u takal a buyu' " Table Mt." talakaw milakuuyt tu cacay a malebut kuce. Pantaw a kalimucu u kasinganganan a Haw-wan-ciw, cacay a malebut enem a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcaan, He-lan tun In-tu kusi a balungn makaadih tina pantawan, itida i Cuo-wan " Table Bay" musaluiemeng itida mutapabaw, malingatu tu Nan-huy a mabulaway nu lui'tan. Kay-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku bangcalay tanayuay a dadipasan, sasasinganganay u Haw-te'-wan, Saw-ni-wan, idaw ku sabaw tusa a tungduh nu buyu' itida i liklik nu dadipasan, sisa pangangan han tu " sabaw tusa a disian a buyu'" i dadipasan nu bayu yadah ku nubayu a gaciw, idaw henay ku nikaadihan tu tusa a malebut enem a lasubuan nu canancanan nu kilangan. Kay-pu-pan-daw a duma nu picidekan a tuudan u tabakiay a ayaman, mikikaka tu kitakid nu pulung tu siwa a bataan a lasubu. Kay-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku nipatideng tu Kay-pu-tun tabakiay a cacudadan. . tataydaan nu aidanganśóÖťĀäśôĮťĽě tataydaan nu aidangan "igu:Tourist attraction", tuda sananay nu aidangan a aidangan, picidekan idaw ku sapatahekal tu hidasananay atu lalangawan nu puc, lui't a nikalalid, hidasananay atu nisangaan tu bangacalay, atu nipaini tu sakalimulan a aaidangan. . canacananÁ®ģť°ě kaakutian nu dadisapan atu lalangaw nu Pa-li-taw patayni tu katuuday a tademaw midang tina Tu-ciw-taw, mahida u dadipasananay a miyuan a nikacaay ka alasias nu demiadan. . pakunida hananay nu aadihan mahida u dadisapan, dihekuay a Tu-ciw-subal, kanatal aidangan, buyu', likelikenan atu kilakilangan u midangay a tademaw atu milisuay a laylay nu aaidangan. tataydaan tu lalangawan a aaidangan. idaw ku tataydaan midang idaw ku nipatucekan mutayda a midang taneng tu namaka kungkuay palatatataydaan midang tu sapalasasiwbayan. pasu mahida i Sin-muo-si-ke-cuo-luo-se-wi-e micapiay a UFO nikahetikan nu hikuki, itida i Su-ke-lan kaadihan tu sidi'tuay nu banaw a Ni-se-banaw. mitahaw tu mahicaay a di'tu palatataydaan nu kapahay a aaidangan. UFO . adidi' ku iluc nu masakaputay atu malaaaidangan, mahida nu Amilikaay a Tang-zin-cia atu In-kuo Lun-tun-pu-li-ke'-se-tun a lumeniay nu In-kuo a niyadu'an. . itini i Amilika, tataydaan midang idaw namin ku payapay mutidengtu i dadadanan atu pacakayay nu misiwbayay, tu tataydaan midang. duma idaw i kunliukiyuk a tataydaan, papatinakuan, kakanen atu kadideng nu liwkangngan atu tabakiay nu papatinakuan a nipabeli tu tataydaan midang nu aadihan tu cudadan. ilabu nu kanatal, mikacaw tu balunga atu basu kanamuhan nu taydaay a midang.
S.PHON: == ńßaw-wan- ¶iw *** == ńßaw-wan- ¶iw " kamu nu nan-ńßuj: kaap di…ô go…ôi…ô ńßoop,(*k**p di **uj…ô Ē~ °**…ôp), kamu nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan kaap d…ô go…ôd…ô ńßoop,(*ka*b d…ô **ud…ô Ē~ °*o*p) , kamu nu pu-taw-ja: ¶abo da boa …ôsp…ôran*a,( Ē~ °ka*u ** Ē~ °*o* *p* Ē~ °…ĺ**s*)" itida i ńß…ôi- ¶uo nan-ńß…ôi-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a nutipan timir~…ĺan, r~…ĺaad tu amis kaj-pu-tun sipwar~…ĺ km, mit…ôpar~…ĺ tu ta-si-j…ôn, itida i kaj-pu-pan-daw a tatapaŇčan, nan-ńß…ôi u tatajdaan nu midaŇčan a kitidaan. itida i su-j…ôn-s…ô kakajdaan a sauwa ¶ ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kajdaan, ńßaw-wan- ¶iw u o- ¶uo sakatajda i war~…ĺian a kakajdaan nu bajuan, katukuńß ajda, nu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan anu ¶aaj pi ¶umud i su-jun-s…ô ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu sauwa ¶, amakajda a ¶a i ńßaw-wan- ¶iw. ina ńßaw-wan- ¶iw ńßina kapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶an nu tad…ômaw u ńßuj- ¶uo tar~…ĺu sakatimur~…ĺ sa, mir~…ĺaad tu war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ pasajda tu war~…ĺian makaar~…ĺa tu ¶ajr~…ĺims…ôp kunr~…ĺi, sir~…ĺaad tu fuo-…ô-s…ô-wan papaŇčawan ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ja bar~…ĺuŇčan katukuńßsa i ta-si-j…ôn atu in-tu-j…ôn kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan a nanuman, tabaki ku bar~…ĺi atu ¶akk…ôp, tada tabakitu ku ¶a ¶…ôk mab…ôr~…ĺin ku bar~…ĺuŇčan ma…ôn…ôp. sadikudaj idaw ńß…ônaj ku i baar~…ĺuŇčaaj a maudipaj nu tad…ômawan mapa ¶as ¶as tajdan i ¶aajaj kakatin…ôŇčan nu ŇčaŇčan, sisa idaw ku maudipaj nu tad…ômawan. sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan ni di-s…ô-ja u " sabaw tu r~…ĺima a kun ¶…ô ku tar~…ĺakaw, tatapaŇčan nu ¶ak…ôp mańßida u dińß…ôp, kur~…ĺur~…ĺ nu ¶ak…ôp mańßida u masikitaj nu buju Ē~ °, makanaj nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj tu kasausi, u sakatar~…ĺawan nu ¶ajn…ômwar~…ĺpi ¶ mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, idaw ku masakaputaj ni ńßu-k…ô-nuo-paj tad…ômaw namaka ńß…ô-r~…ĺan katukuńß i ńßaw-wan- ¶iw. sajawaj nuńß…ôni tabakiaj nu ¶ar~…ĺamaj, mamiput satu r~…ĺikar~…ĺikat nu ibajuaj a tinńßuj. ajdatu a mińß ¶aan, misaŇčan a ¶a ku kaj-pu-tun tu mi ¶apiaj tu dadipasan nu tabakiaj a bar~…ĺuńßaj nu papadikian, ipabaw idaw ku nisur~…ĺitan tu ina kitidaan atu kitakid nu ma ¶ima ¶ian a r~…ĺar~…ĺaadan. ** *** kaj-pu-pan-daw " igu: ¶ap…ô p…ôninsur~…ĺa" , itida i nan-ńßuj masapu ¶uaj a pandaw. nikudan nina pandaw u mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶aan, ńß…ô-r~…ĺan tun in-tu kusi a bar~…ĺuŇčn makaadińß tina pantawan, itida i ¶uo-wan " tabr~…ĺ…ô baj" musar~…ĺui…ôm…ôŇč itida mutapabaw, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu nan-ńßuj a mabur~…ĺawaj nu r~…ĺui Ē~ °tan. kaj-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj tanajuaj a dadipasan, sasasiŇčaŇčanaj u ńßaw-t…ô Ē~ °-wan, saw-ni-wan, idaw ku sabaw tusa a tuŇčduńß nu buju Ē~ ° itida i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu dadipasan, sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " sabaw tusa a disian a buju Ē~ °" i dadipasan nu baju jadańß ku nubaju a ga ¶iw, idaw ńß…ônaj ku nikaadińßan tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut …ôn…ôm a r~…ĺasubuan nu ¶anan ¶anan nu kir~…ĺaŇčan. kaj-pu-pan-daw a duma nu pi ¶id…ôkan a tuudan u tabakiaj a ajaman, mikikaka tu kitakid nu pur~…ĺuŇč tu siwa a bataan a r~…ĺasubu. kaj-pu-tun pantaw idaw ku nipatid…ôŇč tu kaj-pu-tun tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan. . tatajdaan nu aidaŇčan**** tatajdaan nu aidaŇčan "igu:tourist attra ¶tion", tuda sananaj nu aidaŇčan a aidaŇčan, pi ¶id…ôkan idaw ku sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßidasananaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu pu ¶, r~…ĺui Ē~ °t a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺid, ńßidasananaj atu nisaŇčaan tu baŇča ¶ar~…ĺaj, atu nipaini tu sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺan a aaidaŇčan. . ¶ana ¶anan** kaakutian nu dadisapan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw nu pa-r~…ĺi-taw patajni tu katuudaj a tad…ômaw midaŇč tina tu- ¶iw-taw, mańßida u dadipasananaj a mijuan a nika ¶aaj ka ar~…ĺasias nu d…ômiadan. . pakunida ńßananaj nu aadińßan mańßida u dadisapan, dińß…ôkuaj a tu- ¶iw-subar~…ĺ, kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, buju Ē~ °, r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan u midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw atu mir~…ĺisuaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu aaidaŇčan. tatajdaan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aaidaŇčan. idaw ku tatajdaan midaŇč idaw ku nipatu ¶…ôkan mutajda a midaŇč tan…ôŇč tu namaka kuŇčkuaj par~…ĺatatatajdaan midaŇč tu sapar~…ĺasasiwbajan. pasu mańßida i sin-muo-si-k…ô- ¶uo-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-wi-…ô mi ¶apiaj a ufo nikańß…ôtikan nu ńßikuki, itida i su-k…ô-r~…ĺan kaadińßan tu sidi Ē~ °tuaj nu banaw a ni-s…ô-banaw. mitańßaw tu mańßi ¶aaj a di Ē~ °tu par~…ĺatatajdaan nu kapańßaj a aaidaŇčan. ufo . adidi Ē~ ° ku ir~…ĺu ¶ nu masakaputaj atu mar~…ĺaaaidaŇčan, mańßida nu amir~…ĺikaaj a taŇč-zin- ¶ia atu in-kuo r~…ĺun-tun-pu-r~…ĺi-k…ô Ē~ °-s…ô-tun a r~…ĺum…ôniaj nu in-kuo a nijadu Ē~ °an. . itini i amir~…ĺika, tatajdaan midaŇč idaw namin ku pajapaj mutid…ôŇčtu i dadadanan atu pa ¶akajaj nu misiwbajaj, tu tatajdaan midaŇč. duma idaw i kunr~…ĺiukijuk a tatajdaan, papatinakuan, kakan…ôn atu kadid…ôŇč nu r~…ĺiwkaŇčŇčan atu tabakiaj nu papatinakuan a nipab…ôr~…ĺi tu tatajdaan midaŇč nu aadińßan tu ¶udadan. ir~…ĺabu nu kanatar~…ĺ, mika ¶aw tu bar~…ĺuŇča atu basu kanamuńßan nu tajdaaj a midaŇč.
